languages.text: {n}Ювенна прочищает горло.{/n} "Отец. Как я раньше не догадалась! Это люди леди Эланы. Вы, конечно, ее помните?.. Пару часов назад я получила известие о ее гибели. Похоже, это часть ее свиты. Позвольте мне разобраться с ними".
languages.translation_comment:
DL_JuvennaSuspicion_counter +7
стартует DL_JuvennaAgentMask и DL_JuvennaSuspicionAgent, дается Obj1_Add_HelpWithPass

traits.locale_text:
[Драфт]
"Кхм. Отец. Как я раньше не догадалсь! Это люди Эланы — малозначимой дворянки, вы ее не знаете. Но мне пару часов назад доставили известие о ее гибели в пути. Позвольте мне разобраться с ее прислугой и не отрывать вас от важных дел".
удаляем
{n}В воксе торопливо раздается еще один женский голос.{/n}

languages.translation_comment:
DL_JuvennaSuspicion_counter +7
стартует DL_JuvennaAgentMask и DL_JuvennaSuspicionAgent, дается Obj1_Add_HelpWithPass

languages.text: {n}Juvenna clears her throat.{/n} "Father. I should have known! These people are from Lady Elana. You remember her, of course? I received word of her death a few hours ago. They seem to be part of her retinue. Let me deal with them."
languages.original_text: {n}Ювенна прочищает горло.{/n} "Отец. Как я раньше не догадалась! Это люди леди Эланы. Вы, конечно, ее помните?.. Пару часов назад я получила известие о ее гибели. Похоже, это часть ее свиты. Позвольте мне разобраться с ними".

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna clears her throat.{/n} "Father. I should have known! These people are from Lady Elana. You remember her, of course? I received word of her death a few hours ago. They seem to be part of her retinue. Let me deal with them."

{n}Juvenna clears her throat.{/n} "Father. I should have known! These people are from Lady Elana. You remember her, of course? I received word of her death a few hours ago. They seem to be part of her retinue. Let me deal with them."

{n}Juvenna clears her throat.{/n} "Father. I should have known! These people are from Lady Elana. You remember her, of course? I received word of her death a few hours ago. They seem to be part of her retinue. Let me deal with them."

languages.text: {n}尤文娜清了清嗓子。{/n}“父亲，我早该想到的！他们是埃拉娜女士的人。您应该还记得她吧？几个小时前，我刚收到她的死讯。他们应该是她的随从，交给我来处理吧。”
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna clears her throat.{/n} "Father. I should have known! These people are from Lady Elana. You remember her, of course? I received word of her death a few hours ago. They seem to be part of her retinue. Let me deal with them."

traits.locale_text: {n}尤文娜清了清嗓子。{/n}“父亲，我早该想到的！他们是埃拉娜女士的人。您应该还记得她吧？几个小时前，我刚收到她的死讯。他们应该是她的随从，交给我来处理吧。”

languages.text: {n}Juvenna se racle la gorge.{/n} « Père... J'aurais dû m'en douter ! Ces gens servent dame Elana. Vous vous souvenez d'elle, je présume ? J'ai appris sa mort il y a quelques heures à peine. Apparemment, ils font partie de son entourage. Laissez-moi m'en occuper. »
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna clears her throat.{/n} "Father. I should have known! These people are from Lady Elana. You remember her, of course? I received word of her death a few hours ago. They seem to be part of her retinue. Let me deal with them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna se racle la gorge.{/n} « Père... J'aurais dû m'en douter ! Ces gens servent dame Elana. Vous vous souvenez d'elle, je présume ? J'ai appris sa mort il y a quelques heures à peine. Apparemment, ils font partie de son entourage. Laissez-moi m'en occuper. »

languages.text: {n}Juvenna boğazını temizliyor.{/n} "Baba. Tahmin etmeliydim! Bu insanlar Leydi Elana'nın. Onu hatırlıyorsun, değil mi? Birkaç saat önce ölüm haberini aldım. Görünüşe göre onun maiyetinin bir parçasılar. Onlarla ben ilgilenebilirim."
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna clears her throat.{/n} "Father. I should have known! These people are from Lady Elana. You remember her, of course? I received word of her death a few hours ago. They seem to be part of her retinue. Let me deal with them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna boğazını temizliyor.{/n} "Baba. Tahmin etmeliydim! Bu insanlar Leydi Elana'nın. Onu hatırlıyorsun, değil mi? Birkaç saat önce ölüm haberini aldım. Görünüşe göre onun maiyetinin bir parçasılar. Onlarla ben ilgilenebilirim."

languages.text: {n}Juvenna carraspea.{/n} «Padre, ¡debía de haberlo sabido! Esta gente viene de parte de lady Elana. Te acuerdas de ella, ¿no? Hace unas horas que me enteré de su muerte. Deben de ser parte de su séquito. Yo me encargaré de ellos».
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna clears her throat.{/n} "Father. I should have known! These people are from Lady Elana. You remember her, of course? I received word of her death a few hours ago. They seem to be part of her retinue. Let me deal with them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna carraspea.{/n} «Padre, ¡debía de haberlo sabido! Esta gente viene de parte de lady Elana. Te acuerdas de ella, ¿no? Hace unas horas que me enteré de su muerte. Deben de ser parte de su séquito. Yo me encargaré de ellos».

languages.text: {n}Juvenna räuspert sich.{/n} "Vater. Ich hätte es wissen müssen! Diese Leute gehören zu Lady Elana. Ihr erinnert Euch an sie, nehme ich an? Ich habe vor wenigen Stunden von ihrem Tod erfahren. Sie scheinen zu ihrem Gefolge zu gehören. Lasst mich mit ihnen reden."
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna clears her throat.{/n} "Father. I should have known! These people are from Lady Elana. You remember her, of course? I received word of her death a few hours ago. They seem to be part of her retinue. Let me deal with them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna räuspert sich.{/n} "Vater. Ich hätte es wissen müssen! Diese Leute gehören zu Lady Elana. Ihr erinnert Euch an sie, nehme ich an? Ich habe vor wenigen Stunden von ihrem Tod erfahren. Sie scheinen zu ihrem Gefolge zu gehören. Lasst mich mit ihnen reden."

languages.text: {n}ジュベナが咳払いをした。{/n}「父、私が知っていたべきだった。この人たち、エレーナ様の人たちだ。覚えてるわよね？数時間前に彼女の死の報せを受けたの。彼女に仕える者たちらしいわ。私が対応するわ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna clears her throat.{/n} "Father. I should have known! These people are from Lady Elana. You remember her, of course? I received word of her death a few hours ago. They seem to be part of her retinue. Let me deal with them."

traits.locale_text: {n}ジュベナが咳払いをした。{/n}「父、私が知っていたべきだった。この人たち、エレーナ様の人たちだ。覚えてるわよね？数時間前に彼女の死の報せを受けたの。彼女に仕える者たちらしいわ。私が対応するわ。」
